mechanism_narrative: A sustained low level of the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly increasing equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS is below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals weakening labor demand and impending recession, triggering risk-off positioning that produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in >60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the signal shows no statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms robust consumer spending and wealth effects, driving corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a negative information coefficient over a 1-year walk-forward evaluation, or positive returns fail to materialize in >50% of co-occurring expansion months.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and rising corporate earnings, which directly translates into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the following week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >55% of months with positive INDPRO MoM change, or the signal predictive power vanishes after controlling for market momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict negative returns when CPIAUCSL exceeds the threshold, or forward returns remain positive in >65% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate indicates a strengthening labor market that supports wage growth and consumer confidence, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields a negative IC over rolling 3-year windows, or the market fails to price in labor strength with positive returns occurring in <45% of aligned months.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter GDP growth confirms broad-based economic recovery and rising corporate profitability, which sustains equity valuations and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: GDP growth fails to correlate with positive 60-day returns during recovery phases, or the signal shows zero predictive power after adjusting for lagged market returns.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production signals severe supply chain disruptions or demand destruction, triggering recession fears that produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Negative returns do not materialize in >60% of triggered instances, or the threshold signal is statistically indistinguishable from random noise in out-of-sample tests.
